positive: A vibrant, maximalist illustration featuring interconnected bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebulae. The main subject is a central stylized lunar crescent interwoven with detailed, symmetrical tropical leaves and glowing mycelial networks. Style: Intricate linework, Art Nouveau meets cosmic psychedelia, vector quality, high contrast, deeply saturated indigo, emerald green, and electric cyan color palette. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, flattened graphic design suitable for apparel printing. Lighting: Soft, internal glow emanating from the flora and nebulae. Focus on clean silhouettes, graphic impact, and decorative symmetry.
negative: low resolution, blur, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, copyright, blurry, smudge, disfigured, ugly, amateur, cropped, oil paint, realism, bokeh
